mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_alarm (alarmno, calendarno, memberno, alarm_dt, alarm_type, sent_flag, retry_count, rdate) VALUES (calendar_alarm_seq.nextval, #{calendarno}, #{memberno}, #{alarm_dt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{alarm_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sent_flag}, #{retry_count}, SYSTIMESTAMP)
mapper.select:
SELECT a.alarmno, a.calendarno, a.memberno, c.title, c.start_date, c.start_time, a.alarm_dt FROM calendar_alarm a JOIN Calendar c ON a.calendarno = c.calendarno WHERE a.sent_flag = 'N'
AND a.alarm_dt > SYSTIMESTAMP AND a.alarm_dt <= SYSTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '10' MINUTE
